From the Iranian side you can see Speaker of the Iranian Parliament and former IRGC commander Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf and Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi. *Iran's Foreign Ministry hasn't released anything about country's delegation yet.*

🇸🇾 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Hamas: All occupation attempts to change the landmarks of Jerusalem will fail, and our people will not stand idly by in the face of this aggression. Hamas political bureau member and head of the Jerusalem Affairs Office, Haroun Nasser al-Din, affirmed that the occupation's project aimed at connecting settlements in Jerusalem constitutes a dangerous escalation in the policy of imposing Judaization facts and targets the dismemberment and isolation of Jerusalem from its surroundings. He explained that the ongoing confiscation of lands in Abu Dis, Al-Eizariya, Al-Khan Al-Ahmar, and other Jerusalem neighborhoods confirms the occupation's persistence in displacement and ethnic cleansing policies against our people. He stressed that these projects will not change Jerusalem's identity, history, and our firm right to it, and that all occupation attempts to alter landmarks will fail. He called for a comprehensive escalation of all forms of resistance and the unification of national efforts to protect the land and holy sites. Hamas also called on Palestinians in Jerusalem and the occupied interior to flock to the Al-Aqsa Mosque after its reopening following over 40 days of occupation closure, urging Friday to be a day of renewed loyalty and protection for the mosque against occupation attempts to impose new Judaization realities, affirming that Al-Aqsa remains the title of the struggle.

Keir Starmer on Iran: From the get-go, we've been monitoring this situation. So I'm pretty clear in my own mind about what we've agreed and what the use of the bases are. I've been saying we are not going to be dragged into this war because I say there must be a lawful basis. That matters if you're going to commit our service personnel to risk their lives.

⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 IDF Chief of Staff Lt. Gen. Eyal Zamir toured the outskirts of Bint Jbeil in southern Lebanon, stating that “our main combat arena is here in Lebanon” and that the objective is to remove the direct threat to northern residents. He said the IDF’s achievements against Iran are unprecedented and historic, adding that Iran is much weaker than before the war and that Israel is prepared to return to full force if required. Zamir approved new battle plans for the fighting against Hezbollah. @wfwitness

Keir Starmer: I'm fed up with the fact that families across the country see their bills go up and down on energy, businesses' bills go up and down on energy, because of the actions of Putin or Trump across the world.
Netanyahu: There is no ceasefire in Lebanon. We continue to strike Hezbollah with full force, and we will not stop until we restore your security.

⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said there is no ceasefire in Lebanon and Israel continues to strike Hezbollah with force until security is restored for northern residents. After repeated requests from the Lebanese government to open peace talks, Netanyahu instructed the cabinet to open direct negotiations with Lebanon to achieve two goals: The disarmament of Hezbollah and a historic, sustainable peace agreement between Israel and Lebanon. “Israel is stronger than ever, Iran is weaker than ever. I have already brought four peace agreements with Arab states, and I intend to bring more. True peace, peace from strength.” @wfwitness
Trump: Netanyahu is about to slow down in Lebanon. Source: N13

🇮🇷 🌹 Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei: “At this time, I say to Iran's southern neighbors: You are witnessing a miracle. So look carefully, understand well, be in the right place, and beware of the false promises of the devils. We are still waiting for a suitable response from you to show you our brotherhood and goodwill. This will only happen if you abandon the arrogant ones who will not miss any opportunity to humiliate and exploit you. Everyone should know that, with God's permission, we will not leave the aggressors and criminals who attacked our country alone. We will inevitably demand compensation for all the harm done to you and the blood of the martyrs and veterans of this war. We will strive to develop the management of the Strait of Hormuz. We have not sought and will not seek war, but we will not give up our legitimate rights in any way. In this regard, we consider the entire resistance front as a single entity”
🇮🇷 🌹 Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei: “The enemy will compensate us for every damage inflicted”

⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 The Turkish embassy has released a statement on the latest developments in Lebanon: We strongly condemn Israel's escalating attacks on Lebanon, which have resulted in numerous casualties and are further exacerbating the humanitarian situation in Lebanon. Despite the ceasefire recently established in the region, the Netanyahu government continues to target international efforts to establish peace and stability. We reiterate our strong support for the preservation of Lebanon's sovereignty and territorial integrity. The international community must act immediately to end Israel's occupation of Lebanon and protect civilians. The Turkish embassy has also lowered the Turkish flag in light of the National mourning declared in Lebanon. @wfwitness

Open Source Intel Hezbollah-affiliated networks and their media operatives spent time pushing that Iran forced Israel to the table, that Hezbollah had a seat in the ceasefire, that they had won something. Israel hinted at it, Pakistan and Iran said Hezbollah was part of the ceasefire. Their men believed it. Some let their guard down (some are reporting there was a virtual meeting.) Over 300 eliminated in a single operation. 100 targets in 10 minutes. One of the most devastating targeted strikes in the organization’s history. tweet

If the United States stops violating its commitments, negotiations may be possible." tweet

⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 🇮🇷 Politico: A previously undisclosed 2020 U.S. intelligence memo outlined how the Venezuelan Defence Ministry allocated funds from the budget to purchase an Iranian ballistic missile system estimated at around $400 million, but backed down from the initiative after significant U.S pressure. A memo dated January 17th outlined that Venezuelan Defence Minister Padrino Lopez had approved of the purchase and that payments would be funnelled through state owned companies. The system would have been operated from platforms on naval vessels. @wfwitness
Iran's new Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei: We will enter a new phase in the management of the Strait of Hormuz.

⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei declared that the Iranian nation has achieved a decisive victory in the “third imposed war” against the U.S. and Israel, marking the 40th day since the death of his father, Ali Khamenei. He said Iran will demand full compensation for all damages, blood money for the dead, and will introduce a new phase of management over the Strait of Hormuz. He warned Gulf neighbours to witness the miracle of Iran’s resilience, abandon arrogance, and stop trusting false promises of the enemies. @wfwitness

Iran's new Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei: To our southern neighbors: you are witnessing a miracle — see it correctly and stand in the right place. Be suspicious of the false promises of devils.

Iran's new Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei: We will not abandon the criminal aggressors who attacked our country. We will demand compensation for every single damage and the blood price of our martyrs.
